headline: Cathie Wood Teams Up With This Investment Bank To Offer Ark Invest's ETFs In Canada
summary: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest, this week, announced a deal with Canadian investment manager BMO Capital Markets.

summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Elon Musk Bought Twitter In The Name Of Free Speech — But How Will He Wield His New Power?
summary: It’s a recurrent theme in dystopian science fiction novels: the wealthiest man on Earth takes control of the world’s largest news platform.

headline: As Tesla Languishes At 2-Year Low, Here's How Much $1,000 Invested In The Stock Would Be Worth If Cathie Wood's Price Target Is Hit
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) shares are trading at their lowest level in two years, weighed down by a host of factors.

headline: 'When You Log Onto Twitter You Get Punched In The Face': Darren Rovell Not Impressed With Elon Musk's Acquisition
summary: Sports reporter Darren Rovell is active on Twitter, sharing commentary on topics like sports betting, sports memorabilia collecting and the business of sports. Nowadays, thanks to the acquisition of the platform by Elon Musk, Rovell finds himself spending less time on Twitter.

headline: 'Genius Innovator' Elon Musk Gets Italy Proposition, GM Eyes Expedited EV Profitability, Lucid Gravity SUV Landing In 2024 And More: Week's Biggest EV Stories
summary: Electric vehicle stocks closed the week ending Oct. 18 uniformly lower amid the broader market retreat. Market leader Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) continued its move downward amid CEO Elon Musk’s travails with his newly-acquired Twitter social media platform.
